canonical_operators.language: close the top drawer of the cabinet and put the black bowl on top of it

operators.name: Place
operators.description: put the black bowl on top of the cabinet

operators.name: Close
operators.description: close the top drawer of the cabinet

The robot arm picks up the black bowl.
The robot places the black bowl onto the top of the cabinet.
